name: MemMachine
description: MemMachine-backed memory tools with auto recall/capture

apiKey.label: MemMachine API Key
apiKey.help: API key from MemMachine Cloud or your self-hosted deployment.

baseUrl.label: MemMachine Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for the MemMachine service.

userId.label: Default User ID
userId.help: User identifier used for long-term memory scoping.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store recent conversation turns after each agent run.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent run.

searchThreshold.label: Search Score Threshold
searchThreshold.help: Minimum search score required for automatic recall and search results.

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Maximum number of memories to retrieve per search.
